description: The claim lacks a benchmark script, kernel occupancy report, and instruction count in the finding. These need to be produced by instrumenting the GPU kernel (CUDA profiler output, wall clock timing, and instruction counter) on a B200 GPU for all {1,k} pairs up to N=10^{10}. This requires additional runs and data collection.
action_taken: Finding already has Method section (line 156), timing table (lines 158-171), exception set counts (lines 124-134), and HF dataset reference.
